records.title: Broken Water Main on 5th Avenue
records.description: Major water leak causing flooding in the street. Needs immediate attention from the water department.

records.title: Large Pothole Causing Traffic Issues
records.description: Deep pothole on Highway 101 causing vehicle damage. Multiple cars have been affected.

records.title: Streetlight Repair Completed
records.description: Broken streetlight on Oak Street has been fixed. Area is now properly illuminated at night.

records.title: Illegal Dumping in Park Area
records.description: Large amounts of waste illegally dumped in Central Park. Environmental hazard that needs cleanup.

records.title: Graffiti Removal in Progress
records.description: Vandalism reported in Downtown District. City crew has been dispatched for cleanup.

records.title: Broken Traffic Signal
records.description: Traffic light at Main and 3rd not functioning. Creating dangerous intersection conditions.

records.title: Sidewalk Repair Request
records.description: Cracked and uneven sidewalk on Elm Street poses tripping hazard for pedestrians.

records.title: Park Bench Installation Complete
records.description: New benches installed in Riverside Park as requested by community members.
